# Contributing to ReplBridge

Thank you for your interest in contributing to ReplBridge!

## Contributor License Agreement (CLA)

**Before any pull request can be merged, you must sign our Contributor License Agreement (CLA).**

When you open a pull request, our CLA bot will automatically post a comment asking you to sign the CLA. You must sign it before your PR can be reviewed or merged.

The CLA is available at [.github/cla.md](./cla.md).

## Why a CLA?

A CLA allows the project maintainer (Alex Santos) to:
- Relicense contributions in the future (e.g., moving to a source-available license)
- Protect against competing SaaS providers using the code against the project's interests
- Keep the project sustainable long-term

## How to Sign

1. Open a pull request.
2. The CLA Assistant bot will comment with a link to sign.
3. Follow the link and sign the CLA.
4. Your PR will be unblocked once signing is confirmed.

## Contribution Guidelines

- Fork the repository and create a feature branch.
- Write clear commit messages.
- Ensure your code passes all existing tests.
- Open a PR describing what you changed and why.

## Code of Conduct

Please be respectful and constructive in all interactions.
